svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Docker Security Architecture" id="phIpA1HVR3VOjFgtviIv"> <mxGraphModel dx="1030" dy="664" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#000000;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Docker Security Architecture — Auth Service" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="700" x="350" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9d9d9;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="Builder Stage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="320" width="500" x="280" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=14;" value="1. Base Image: node:18-alpine" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="320" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=14;" value="2. Copy source code" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="320" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=14;" value="3. Run npm ci (install dependencies)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="320" y="195" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=14;" value="4. Run npm run build (compile)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="320" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=14;" value="5. Run SonarQube SAST scan" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="320" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=14;" value="6. Run Trivy image scan" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="320" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-9" edge="1" parent="1" source="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;" target="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-10" value="Copy only production artifacts"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="Runtime Stage (Hardened)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="400" width="500" x="280" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf7e8;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;" value="1. Base Image: node:18-alpine (minimal)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="320" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-12" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf7e8;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;" value="2. Create non-root user: appuser" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="320" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-13" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf7e8;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;" value="3. Set USER appuser" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="320" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-14" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf7e8;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;" value="4. Copy built artifacts only" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="320" y="630" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-15" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf7e8;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;" value="5. Read-only filesystem enabled ✅" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="320" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-16" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=14;fontColor=#b30000;" value="6. No privileged mode ❌" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="320" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-17" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=14;fontColor=#b30000;" value="7. Drop all Linux capabilities ❌" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="320" y="780" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-18" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf7e8;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;" value="8. Expose port 3000 only" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="320" y="820" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-19" edge="1" parent="1" source="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;" target="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-20" value="Push to Registry (if scan passes)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-20" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="Container Registry" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="500" x="280" y="950" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-21" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=14;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="• Image stored with SHA256 digest" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="420" x="320" y="980" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-22" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=14;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="• Signed with Docker Content Trust" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="420" x="320" y="1040" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-23" edge="1" parent="1" source="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-20" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;" target="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-24" value="Pull and Deploy"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-24" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1f4e78;strokeColor=#0b2e4f;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#ffffff;" value="Running Pod in K8s" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="500" x="280" y="1160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-25" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=14;fontColor=#ffffff;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="• securityContext enforced" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="420" x="320" y="1205" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-26" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=14;fontColor=#ffffff;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="• readOnlyRootFilesystem: true ✅" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="420" x="320" y="1240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-27" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=14;fontColor=#ffffff;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="• runAsNonRoot: true ✅" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="420" x="320" y="1295" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-28" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=14;fontColor=#ffffff;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="• allowPrivilegeEscalation: false ❌" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="420" x="320" y="1320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-29" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=14;fontColor=#ffffff;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="• Falco monitoring runtime behavior" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="420" x="320" y="1345" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-30" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="Security Checklist" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="350" width="320" x="860" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-31" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=15;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="✅ Multi-stage build" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="260" x="890" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-32" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=15;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="✅ Non-root user" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="260" x="890" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-33" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=15;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="✅ Read-only filesystem" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="260" x="890" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-34" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=15;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="✅ No privileged mode" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="260" x="890" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-35" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=15;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="✅ Trivy scanned" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="260" x="890" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-36" parent="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="US15p2fYVX9dhqVMRuP8-37" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=15;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="✅ CIS Docker Benchmark compliant" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="280" x="890" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
